markdownRemark.html:
Take a path and see where you're lead,
Plant a seed and watch the roots spread,
Own every word that you have said,
A life's not lived when it's lived scared,

You, can, you can

Pull all shadows out of their hides,
Face the chaos with open eyes,
You don't know without having tried,
Never turn back, walk on with pride,

You, can, you can

Give to the moment breaths of life,
Have the courage to more than survive,
Accept that to flourish is to strive,
Forefather's steps should be walked in strides,

You, can, you can

Choose to not wait for those blue skies,
Better to fail than not to try,
Always fear a vile serpent's bite,
Move forth and strike with all your might,

You, can, You, can,

Walk on the shoulders of giants,
Want for more than your station grants,
Take the fates' hands and lead the dance,
Whenever cornered show defiance,

You, can, you can

There's no excuse when now's your chance,
Look forward and learn from the past,
You're more than how the cards are cast,
Succeed in that with which you're tasked,

You, can, you can

Shine light on what lurks in the dark,
Claim what's yours when it's yours to grasp,
Face the wolves till they're all unmasked,
Sometimes you must carve your own path,

You, can, you can

Move forth and fight till something gives,
When dice roll take it as it is,
The one and all is all of us,
You can be more and all of this,

You, can, You, can,
